items.title: Chelsea Premier League and Champions League winner, 31, completes shock transfer to second-division side
items.summary: KURT ZOUMA has completed a shock transfer to Palm City FC in the United Arab Emirates. The French defender boasts a successful Premier League career with clubs such as Chelsea, Everton and West Ham. Zouma, 31, has since become a journeyman, having left English football in 2024. He first joined Al-Or

items.title: Chelsea ‘targeting shock move for forgotten English forward, 23, as replacement for £40million flop Alejandro Garnacho’
items.summary: CHELSEA have lined up a move for a forgotten England ace Jonathan Rowe to replace Alejandro Garnacho, reports suggest. items.title: Retiring England greats out cheaply as hosts set for heavy defeat at Lord's
items.summary: England are hurtling towards a seemingly inevitable defeat to India in the historic Women's Test at Lord's after closing on 130-6 in a record chase of 457, with Heather Knight and Tammy Beaumont out cheaply in their final knocks before international retirement.

items.title: 'We have another level we can reach' - Kane defends frustrated Tuchel
items.summary: Captain Harry Kane says England "have another level we can reach" as they bid to win the World Cup for the first time since 1966.

items.title: Argentina v England 1998 - Owen, Beckham and penalty pain
items.summary: England meet Argentina in the last 16 of the 1998 World Cup.

items.title: Argentina v England 2002 - Redemption for Beckham
items.summary: England meet Argentina in the group stage of the 2002 World Cup.

items.title: World Cup latest: 2030 tournament could have 64 teams, says Infantino
England latest: We're 'knocking on the door’ of World Cup glory, says Kane
Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup
items.summary: Plans for a 64-team men's world cup are set to be picked up and assessed in detail after the 2026 tournament with Fifa boss Gianni Infantino saying football needs to be "for the whole world".

items.title: 'Written off as too old' - France beat up-and-coming Spain in 2006
items.summary: Spain meet France in the last 16 of the 2006 World Cup.

items.title: How Maradona dominated England in 1986
items.summary: Diego Maradona leads his Argentina team to victory against England in the quarter-final of the World Cup in 1986.

items.title: Tuchel and Bellingham need to cool tension with England so close to history
items.summary: The latest episode of Thomas versus Jude does not have to descend into a drama and team cannot afford to be distracted heading into the World Cup semi-final Thomas Tuchel lobbed a grenade into the mix. items.title: Team GB hero Keely Hodgkinson stuns while wearing England World Cup top as she flashes midriff in glamorous selfie
items.summary: TEAM GB star Keely Hodgkinson expressed her support for England with a glam World Cup selfie. Hodgkinson, 24, has made her country proud with an Olympic gold in Paris 2024 and silver in Tokyo 2020 at the 800m event. But the runner is now focusing on the Three Lions, who are looking to follow in...

items.title: Girl, 17, crushed to death by lorry while celebrating France’s World Cup win over Morocco is pictured as driver charged
items.summary: THE teenage girl crushed to death by a lorry while celebrating France's World Cup victory over Morocco has been pictured.
